dental.subject: Quick idea for {business_name} — AI tools for your practice
dental.body:
Hi there,

My name is Aditya — I'm an AI & automation engineer who works exclusively with dental and dermatology practices.

I came across {business_name}'s website ({website_url}) and noticed it could benefit from a few modern upgrades. A lot of dental practices I work with are losing patients to competitors who offer a smoother digital experience.

Here's what I typically build for practices like yours:

  → AI-powered online booking (patients book 24/7 — no phone calls needed)
  → Automated appointment reminders via SMS & email (cuts no-shows by 30%)
  → AI chat assistant that answers patient FAQs after hours
  → Custom patient analytics dashboard for your front desk
  → Any other automation or AI tool your practice needs

I work as a solo engineer, so everything is built specifically for you — not an off-the-shelf product. Turnaround is typically 5–7 days.

See a live demo of a dental booking system I built:
{promo_url}

Would you be open to a 10-minute call to see if any of this would be useful for {business_name}?

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi
AI & Automation Engineer
(Specialising in Dental & Dermatology Practices)

derm.subject: AI tools built specifically for {business_name}
derm.body:
Hi there,

My name is Aditya — I'm an AI & automation engineer specialising in dermatology and dental clinics.

I came across {business_name} ({website_url}) and noticed some opportunities to make your clinic run more efficiently and attract more patients online.

Here's what I build for skin clinics and dermatologists:

  → Online booking system (patients schedule consultations 24/7 from your site)
  → Automated appointment reminders (SMS + email — eliminates most no-shows)
  → AI assistant that handles patient enquiries and pre-screening after hours
  → Custom reporting & analytics for treatments, revenue, and patient retention
  → Any bespoke software or automation your clinic needs

I'm a solo engineer — every solution I build is custom-made for your clinic, not a generic template. Most projects are live within a week.

See a demo of what this looks like in practice:
{promo_url}

Would you have 10 minutes for a quick call to discuss what would work best for {business_name}?

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi
AI & Automation Engineer
(Specialising in Dermatology & Dental Practices)

dental_no_booking_ai.subject: Your dental practice is missing something — I can fix it in a week
dental_no_booking_ai.body:
Hi there,

My name is Aditya — I'm an AI & automation engineer who works exclusively with dental and skin clinics.

I visited {business_name}'s website ({website_url}) — it looks professional, but I noticed you don't have online booking or an AI assistant for patients. In 2025, practices without these typically lose 30–40% of potential new patients who can't be bothered to call.

I can build the following for {business_name} — custom, not off-the-shelf:

  → AI booking system — patients book 24/7 directly from your website
  → Automated SMS & email reminders — drastically reduces no-shows
  → AI chat assistant — answers patient questions instantly, even after hours
  → New patient intake forms — automated and paperless
  → Analytics dashboard — see bookings, revenue, and patient trends at a glance
  → Any other AI or automation tool you need

I'm a solo specialist, so you deal directly with me — fast communication, full customisation, typically live in 5–7 days.

See a live example:
{promo_url}

Could we get on a 10-minute call this week? I can show you exactly what I'd build for {business_name}.

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi
AI & Automation Engineer
(Specialising in Dental & Dermatology Practices)

derm_no_booking_ai.subject: {business_name} — I noticed something missing on your website
derm_no_booking_ai.body:
Hi there,

My name is Aditya — I'm an AI & automation engineer who builds custom software for dermatology and dental clinics.

I visited {business_name}'s website ({website_url}) — it's well-designed, but I noticed there's no online booking or AI assistant for your patients. Most modern clinics are adding these now, and it makes a noticeable difference in patient volume and staff workload.

Here's what I can build specifically for {business_name}:

(Specialising in Dermatology & Dental Practices)
